calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-31-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Myron Sugarman appeared by telephone for Hugh Chatman, Jr.

Mr. Sugarman stated that when the San Francisco property sold the escrow proceeds were directed the Florida estate, that the funds are still in that estate, that an accounting should have been done but that it wasn't. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Continued To Dec-31-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
